meaning: Automatic Teller Machine,自动取款(出纳)机;Asynchronous Transfer Mode,异步传输模式
examples: She was drawing out cash from an ATM.
To remember your ATM PIN (4298, say), imagine yourself on a sailboat when a swan tries to attack you.
My card was eaten by the ATM.
Abu Dhabi has the world's most expensive hotel ever built and the first ever gold-dispensing ATM.
Cyprian depositors are currently lining up at ATM machines to redeem what is rightfully their money.
